description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage using the ubuntu:latest Docker image. In the job script, run `apt-get update -qy`, then `apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip`, followed by `pip3 install .[dev]`, and finally execute `pytest test --rabbit-api-uri http://guest:guest@rmq:15672 --rabbit-amqp-uri pyamqp://guest:guest@rmq:5672/ -v`. Add a rabbitmq:3.6-management service with alias rmq, and do not configure any caches, artifacts, or special rules.
